phase_critical_quality_notes.context-chunking-approach: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 0 — convert to canonical Markdown (§1), wire **solution.conf** (§2), scan structure and write **context_chunking_spec** (§3–§4). No pass/fail “readiness.” No terms/story map.
phase_critical_quality_notes.canonical-context: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 1 context package — chunks, context_index.json, manifest. Hard gate: **alidate_context_contract.py** when the index is present.
phase_critical_quality_notes.terms-mechanisms: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 2 terms/mechanisms — every substantive row cites **chunk_id** per contract. No promoted concepts[] yet.
phase_critical_quality_notes.shaped-story-map: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 3 **mm3_story_map.json** — shaped story map, **evidence_chunk_ids[]**, scanner **phase3_story_map_evidence.py**. Read **shaped-story-map.md** + rule **shaped-story-shape**.
phase_critical_quality_notes.domain-types: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 4 sparse types — promotion bar, **owns**, evidence; story map precedes types (rule **story-map-before-domain-types**).
phase_critical_quality_notes.variant-classification: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 5 variant representation — explicit per-family decisions **before** deep property work (rule **ariant-decisions-before-deepen**).
phase_critical_quality_notes.deepen: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 6 deepen — responsibilities, depends_on, no anemic/god concepts; approved tooling only (rule **deepen-approved-tools-only**).
phase_critical_quality_notes.integrate: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 7 integrate — one coherent map/model/spec; drain candidate queue; cross-cutting resolved or deferred in writing.
phase_critical_quality_notes.validate-render: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 8 gates — ** uild.py** pipeline, **chunks_must_be_referenced.py**, manifest, reproducible reports. Render traces to validated artifacts.
